/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/src/runtime_core.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/src/runtime_input.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/src/runtime_renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/inconsole-runtime-x86.dir/src/runtime_scenes.cpp.o" -o inconsole-runtime-x86  -lSDL2 -lfreetype -lpng16 -lpthread
